title: 16S Illumina Primer Plate Aliquoting (5µM Forward & Reverse working plates)
author: Rodolfo A Salido Benitez
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.uz7ex9n
materials: ep.T.I.P.S. Motion Racks 1 - 50 µL w/ filter
ep.T.I.P.S. Motion Racks 20 - 300 µL w/ filter
96-Well plates of resuspended primers (100µM) from IDT
Barcoded forward primers (100µM) from IDT stock plates

steps.title: Resuspend Reverse Primer
steps.instruction: Resuspend Reverse Primer from lyophilized sample vial to a final concentration of 100 µM

steps.title: Prepare Reverse Primer Working Solution
steps.instruction: In a sterile 30mL reservoir, add 15,840 µL of PCR Clean Water and 880 µL of Reverse Primer (100 µM) to make (4) 96-Well primer working plates. 15840 µL, PCR Clean Water 880 µL, Reverse Primer (100µM)

steps.title: Thaw and Centrifuge Primer Plates
steps.instruction: Thaw and centrifuge 96-Well resuspended primer plates.

steps.title: Follow the diagram bellow while setting...
steps.instruction: Follow the diagram bellow while setting up the epMotion worktable Place (

steps.title: boxes of ep
steps.instruction: boxes of ep.T.I.P.S. Motion Racks 1 - 50 µL w/ filter in slots A2-A5 Place (

steps.title: box of ep
steps.instruction: box of ep. T.I.P.S. Motion Racks 20 - 300 µL w/ filter in slot B5 Place (

steps.title: 96-Well plates of resuspended primers (100µM)...
steps.instruction: 96-Well plates of resuspended primers (100µM) from IDT in slots B1-B4 Place (

steps.title: Place 30 mL reservoir with reverse primer (5
steps.instruction: Place 30 mL reservoir with reverse primer (5.26 µM) in slot 1 of the Resevoir Rack and place Rack in slot C5

steps.title: Execute Automated Aliquoting Protocol
steps.instruction: Remove box lids and plate foils and execute protocol. (Protocol must be imported to epBlue software prior to attempting to execute it. epBlue 40.6 or later ) Application_4_5uM_Primer_40ul_181003_105836.export6 The automated protocol transfers 38µL of reverse primer (5.26µM) into the (4) different 96-Well Primer Plates using the multidispense feature of the epBlue software. Then it transfer 2µL of barcoded forward primers (100µM) from IDT stock plates into the (4) different 96-Well Primer Plates (working plates)

steps.title: Seal and Store Plates
steps.instruction: Remove plates from worktable and seal with storage aluminum foils.
